text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm taking a break at the park when I see a bunch
of kids chasing an Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh ho ho ho! You won't catch me in a million
years!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text:
Dang it! Give us another chance! We'll get you
this time!

text_block_list.name: Boy B
text_block_list.text: Yeah, we'll corner you this time for sure!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
As a princess, I welcome any challenge! Let's see
what you've got!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Wait uuuuup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've never seen such a one-sided game of tag.
Kawakami Princes is no easy target. She leaps
over a swing and scales the jungle gym with ease.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Hehe! None of you are a match for me!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text:
That's no fair! You're older so you hafta go easy
on us!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A princess never pulls her punches! If you're mad
that you can't win, then you need to think harder
and figure out how to beat me!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
There's no problem that can't be solved as long as
you have wisdom, courage, and an iron fist!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: You over there! You agree with me, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you. You're a master instructor of running,
so give some advice to these children!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Well, there's no way they stand a chance of
winning a footrace against an Umamusume, so to
even the odds...
choice_data_list: Why not change the rules a little?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If Kawakami Princess has to catch all of the
children on her own, it should be a challenge even
for her.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't sit well with me for a princess such as
myself to be called an "it," but...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A princess's worth boils down to how well she can
nab a prince!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I shall accept this challenge! I'll have
you all rounded up in no time! I'll start counting,
so get ready. One, two, three...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the count of ten, Kawakami Princess begins
chasing down the children with alarming ferocity
and catches them one after another!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest adding a rule where the children can
step on her shadow to tag her, so they don't
necessarily need to physically catch up with her.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
My, giving them the privilege to touch a
princess's shadow since they cannot quite reach
me is an excellent compromise!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely wonderful. This reminds me of stories
where the noble knight forever chases after a
princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Now, then! Try your hardest to catch me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess dashes off with a flourish. She
brilliantly uses the shade of the trees to evade her
own shadow being touched.
